locations_inspected.name: Lone Star Property Holdings, LP
findings: System is a 20-year-old Dry Pipe manufactured by Reliable and is NFPA 13 Compliant.
6 control valves inspected. All found in open position. Tamper switches: Not all connected.
Water flow alarm and supervisory signal were tested and are operational.
Sprinkler heads visual condition is Fair (minor corrosion observed). Adequate supply of spare heads in cabinet.
Water supply is adequate (Static Pressure: 42 psi, Residual Pressure: 49 psi, Flow: 1029 GPM).
deficiencies: 1. [Priority] Combustible storage within 18 inches of sprinkler deflectors
2. [Code] Exposed wiring and missing junction box covers in main electrical room

recommendations.description: Remove combustible storage within 18 inches of sprinkler deflectors.
Correct exposed wiring and replace missing junction box covers in main electrical room to meet code.
